retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds when called on a valid object; if the pointer is NULL there is nothing to do. No failure condition exists for caller to retry.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on an amdgpu_usermode_queue object. If the queue pointer is non-NULL, it decrements the refcount via kref_put, and when the refcount reaches zero, the amdgpu_userq_kref_destroy destructor is invoked. The caller must not use the queue after calling this function because the object may be freed. No return value is provided, so the caller has no failure to recover from.
